description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.26.3 fixes DeepSeek desktop refresh when an API key is configured, keeps API-key providers on the automatic API source path instead of unsupported CLI mode, and hardens startup launch diagnostics so raw CLI argument values are not written to temp logs.
